summary: PR #2376 decompiled and wired substantial Arwing Laser item code under src/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser, expanded the arwinglaser item-vars layout in itCharItems.h, and corrected/exported prototypes in itarwinglaser.h. Bot report records 10 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser plus 3 partially improved functions.

key_files.role: Main implementation for Arwing Laser item behavior; added state table data, helper data, spawn/setup functions, physics callbacks, collision callbacks, reflect/mirror callbacks, and required includes.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser.c added 515 deleted 0 hunks 3

raw_diff: additions include ItemStateTable it_803F8DE8, static Vec2 it_803F8E48, it_802E70BC, it_802E72E0, it_802E7654, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Phys, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Phys, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Coll, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Coll, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion5_Coll, it_802E8420, it_802E85F4
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reported 10 new matches and 3 unmatched-item improvements for main/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser

key_files.role: Expanded itArwingLaser_ItemVars from coarse padding/unknown slots into typed fields used by the new C implementation.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/itCharItems.h added 19 deleted 12 hunks 1
raw_diff: itArwingLaser_ItemVars adds HSD_JObj* xDF8, f32 xDFC/xE00/xE04/xE08/xE34, Vec3 xE0C, s32 xE3C/xE48/xE4C and updates offset comments

key_files.role: Header prototype maintenance for newly recovered/exported Arwing Laser functions and duplicate prototype cleanup.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser.h added 4 deleted 2 hunks 1
raw_diff: adds prototypes for it_802E70BC, it_802E72E0, it_802E7654 and removes duplicate bool it_802E838C declaration

what_changed.text: Added decompiled Arwing Laser state table entries and static offset vector data in itarwinglaser.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F8DE8[] with six entries
raw_diff: static Vec2 it_803F8E48[] with four 200-unit offsets

what_changed.text: Implemented several Arwing Laser behavior routines covering collision probing, spawning, motion physics, stage-specific position adjustment, attached child-beam synchronization, reflection, and mirroring.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802E70BC uses it_8026EA9C/mpGetSpeed/mpLineGetFlags with a for loop over four offsets
raw_diff: it_802E72E0 and it_802E7654 build SpawnItem records and initialize arwinglaser item vars
raw_diff: motion/collision callbacks call HSD_JObjSetScale, grCorneria_801DDCF0, efSync_Spawn, Item_8026AE84, lbVector_Mirror

what_changed.text: Recovered additional typed fields for itArwingLaser_ItemVars instead of leaving a broad padding gap between xDF8 and xE18 and several pad fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h replaces _pad1 with xDF8, xDFC, xE00, xE04, xE08, xE0C and changes xE34_pad/xE3C_pad into typed fields

what_changed.text: Header exports were updated for newly added non-static functions and a duplicate declaration was removed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itarwinglaser.h adds it_802E70BC, it_802E72E0, it_802E7654
raw_diff: removes duplicate bool it_802E838C(Item_GObj*) line

what_changed.text: Automated report shows 10 new 100% matches and 3 partially improved functions in the same unit.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 lists matched code +2992 bytes and matched data +224 bytes

text_corpus: new matches include itArwinglaser_UnkMotion5_Coll, it_802E8420, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Phys, it_802E85F4, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Phys, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Coll, itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Coll, .data, .sdata2, .sdata
text_corpus: improvements include it_802E7654 98.00%, it_802E72E0 96.95%, it_802E70BC 90.59%

smart_moves.text: The PR updated the item-var struct before using the recovered slots throughout the implementation, keeping access through ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser fields rather than raw byte offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h adds typed arwinglaser fields
raw_diff: itarwinglaser.c repeatedly uses ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser.xDF8/xDFC/xE0C/xE34/xE48/xE4C

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were kept in the owning item header as function bodies were added, and a duplicate existing declaration was removed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itarwinglaser.h prototype additions and duplicate it_802E838C deletion

smart_moves.text: A four-entry static Vec2 table plus a normal for loop expresses repeated collision probes in it_802E70BC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static Vec2 it_803F8E48[]
raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) uses it_803F8E48[i].x/y

smart_moves.text: JObj operations use existing HSD_JObj helper calls for rotation, scale, translation, and flag updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls HSD_JObjSetRotationY, HSD_JObjSetRotationX, HSD_JObjSetRotationZ, HSD_JObjSetScale, HSD_JObjGetTranslation, HSD_JObjSetTranslate, HSD_JObjGetScale, HSD_JObjGetRotation, HSD_JObjSetRotation, HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering item behavior that depends on per-item state, first expand the relevant ItemVars union arm with typed fields where the diff proves access patterns, then use those fields consistently in the implementation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itArwingLaser_ItemVars expanded with typed fields at ip+0xDF8 through ip+0xE4C
raw_diff: new functions access those fields through ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small directional probe tables can make repeated collision checks reviewable and matchable; here a four-entry Vec2 table drives a for loop over cardinal offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static Vec2 it_803F8E48[] contains four offsets
raw_diff: it_802E70BC loops i < 4 and applies table offsets before it_8026EA9C calls

decomp_lessons.lesson: For recovered functions that become externally visible, update the owning header in the same PR and clean duplicate declarations while touching that header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itarwinglaser.h adds prototypes for it_802E70BC, it_802E72E0, it_802E7654
raw_diff: duplicate bool it_802E838C declaration removed

naming_conventions.text: The PR retains address-style names for functions and data where semantic names are not proven, such as it_802E70BC, it_802E72E0, it_802E7654, it_803F8DE8, and it_803F8E48.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added address-style function and data names in itarwinglaser.c and itarwinglaser.h

naming_conventions.text: Local names use short role names for common object pointers and vectors, including ip, jobj, parent_ip, new_gobj, spawn, scale_vec, prev_pos, curr_pos, and hit_count.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declarations in newly added functions

naming_conventions.text: New motion callback names follow the existing itArwinglaser_UnkMotionN_Anim/Phys/Coll pattern rather than inventing semantic motion-state labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: existing itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Anim and UnkMotion3_Anim with new UnkMotion2_Phys, UnkMotion3_Phys, UnkMotion2_Coll, UnkMotion3_Coll, UnkMotion5_Coll

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Uses a normal for loop over a static four-element Vec2 table to express repeated collision-ray checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_803F8E48 table and for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) in it_802E70BC

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Uses grouped switch cases for related Arwing Laser types, including 0/2 and 4/5 in setup paths and 1/3 in directional/physics paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: switch(type) and switch(ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser.xE38) cases in it_802E72E0, it_802E7654, physics and reflect functions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Uses ternary assignments for facing direction based on vector or velocity sign.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ip->facing_dir = (ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser.xE0C.x >= 0.0f) ? 1.0f : -1.0f
raw_diff: ip->facing_dir = (ip->x40_vel.x < 0.0f) ? -1.0f : 1.0f

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Contains explicit padding/dummy locals such as u32 pad, u8 pad, and unused float locals in some matched functions; bot evidence shows some affected functions reached 100%, but the PR slice does not include author explanation for why these locals are required.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u32 pad in itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Phys, u8 pad in it_802E8420, float f0/f1/f2/f3/f4 in itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Phys
text_corpus: bot report lists itArwinglaser_UnkMotion3_Phys, it_802E8420, and itArwinglaser_UnkMotion2_Phys as 100.00%

notes: Diff and bot report strongly support changed files, matched-function names, and automated progress numbers.
The PR body contains no technical rationale beyond tracking text, and there are no loaded inline review comments.
The bot report supports match/improvement status for listed functions, but the slice does not include objdiff logs, build commands, or author notes explaining specific codegen tactics.
Some dummy/pad locals are visible in the diff; without author/reviewer explanation they are recorded as tactics with limited evidence, not promoted as general style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Expand typed ItemVars before implementing item behavior
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2376 shows a focused item decomp pattern: recover typed slots in itArwingLaser_ItemVars and use ip->xDD4_itemVar.arwinglaser fields throughout the implementation, rather than relying on padding or raw offset access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h expands itArwingLaser_ItemVars
raw_diff: itarwinglaser.c uses recovered arwinglaser fields across new functions

accepted_candidate_records.title: Static direction table plus for loop for repeated collision probes
accepted_candidate_records.text: In it_802E70BC, a static four-entry Vec2 table and a for loop express repeated cardinal collision probes; this is a concrete example of preferring a natural indexed loop for repeated probe logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static Vec2 it_803F8E48[]
raw_diff: for loop in it_802E70BC indexes it_803F8E48

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic meanings for xDF8/xDFC/xE0C/xE48/xE4C beyond their types/usages in this diff; names remain offset-style.
Do not claim all newly added functions are fully matched: bot report lists it_802E7654, it_802E72E0, and it_802E70BC as improved but still below 100%.
Do not infer reviewer rationale from the empty approval review.
Do not promote dummy/pad locals as accepted style; the slice only shows their presence and bot match outcomes, not necessity.
